expectations.text: No false flag on unexported helpers

expectations.evidence: UserRepository correctly NOT flagged — agent found cross-package reference in internal/adapter via compile-time check. Notifier correctly flagged as genuinely unused (no implementation in repo). DI pattern (interfaces → injection → adapter) not questioned.
Report [Important]: 'generateID returns a constant ID, causing non-unique user IDs.'
Covers nil notifier panic, missing test coverage for all paths.
